expectations.evidence: src/main/java/com/example/app/config/TurboSignConfig.java exists as a TurboSign config file
TurboSignConfig.java creates client using Builder pattern: new TurboDocxClient.Builder().apiKey(apiKey).baseUrl(baseUrl).build(). However it only uses apiKey and baseUrl, missing senderEmail.
.env.example contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY but NOT TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL. application.properties has turbosign.api-key and turbosign.base-url but no sender-email property.
No file contains partner API key variables anywhere in the project
Files placed in src/main/java/com/example/app/ with proper package structure (config/, controller/, service/, dto/)
All generated files use .java extension (TurboSignConfig.java, TurboSignController.java, TurboSignService.java, SignatureRequest.java, SignatureResponse.java)
